title: VimFu — :g with :s — Substitute on Matches
description: Combine :g and :s to run substitution only on lines matching a different pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Global with S. Run a substitution only on lines that match a different pattern.

steps.comment: --- Demo: type the command, narrate while it's on the cmdline, then commit ---

steps.say: Let's replace old with new, but only on the name lines that follow class definitions.
Colon G slash class slash matches every line containing class. Plus one shifts the target down one line. Then S slash old slash new slash G substitutes on that next line.
Old became new on the lines after class. The helper function's name still says old.
Global with S. Two patterns working together — one to filter, one to transform.
